snippet.title: We have to continue to advocate for the steel industry in the U.S., says Nucor CEO Leon Topalian
snippet.description: Nucor CEO Leon Topalian goes one-on-one with 'Mad Money' host Jim Cramer to talk share repurchasing, steel tariffs and more.

snippet.title: We have to continue to advocate for the steel industry in the U.S., says Nucor CEO Leon Topalian
